title: Pre-training Objectives
content:
# Pre-training Objectives

*   **BERT MLM:** Predicts masked tokens using bidirectional contexts: $\mathcal{L} = -\sum_{i \in M} \log P(x_i \mid \mathbf{x}_{\setminus M})$
*   **GPT CLM:** Autoregressive generation predicting the next token using causal context: $\mathcal{L} = -\sum_{t=1}^T \log P(x_t \mid x_1 \dots x_{t-1})$
